raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "Wildfires in California are becoming worse each year.",
    "In 2021, California experienced 8,786 active wildfires, burning approximately 2,568,941 acres of land.",
    "The 2021 wildfires in California destroyed 3,629 structures and resulted in the deaths of three citizens.",
    "The state has allocated $1.5 billion towards wildfire prevention for the 2021-2022 budget.",
    "California requires that $200 million from the greenhouse gas reduction fund be spent annually on wildfire mitigation until 2028.",
    "AB 1717 expands the definition of public works to include fuel reduction work performed as part of a wildfire mitigation project.",
    "Designating wildfire mitigation projects as public works demonstrates a commitment to community protection and fair wages for workers.",
    "There is a workforce crisis affecting the delivery of wildfire mitigation projects in California.",
    "AB 1717 aims to ensure a robust, highly trained workforce for fuels reduction work in California."
  ]
}
```
